title: MikroTik RB924iR-2nD-BT5&BG770A&R11e-LR8G, KNOT LR8G kit
description: The MikroTik KNOT LR8G kit is a compact, ready-to-use gateway designed for LoRa applications . It is engineered to provide affordable and reliable connectivity even in remote locations. It supports LTE CAT-M1 and NB2 , Bluetooth 5.2 , 2.4 GHz WiFi , GPS , and comes equipped with two Ethernet ports ( 1x PoE-in, 1x PoE-out ), making it a flexible solution for any IoT deployment Mobile internet connectivity via CAT-M1 and NB2 allows significant cost savings while enabling remote monitoring and management of devices without the need for expensive data plans or full LTE coverage Whether you are monitoring critical data in hospitals, managing vending machines in shopping malls, or collecting sensor data in the middle of fields â the KNOT LR8G ensures continuous connectivity Concurrent GPS and LTE CAT-M connection Track moving assets using GPS combined with LTE CAT-M1. An ideal solution for service vehicles, containers, or other mobile equipment Versatile power options Choose between powering via PoE, DC jack, or MicroUSB â plus you can power additional devices through the second Ethernet port with PoE-out functionality (max. 650 mA for voltage <30 V, max. 450 mA for voltage >30 V) SMA connectors for all main interfaces Easy antenna connection for LTE, GPS, and LoRa Improved LoRa reception at 868 MHz Enhanced sensitivity for stronger signal and longer range , even in interference-heavy environments Lower price, same quality and reliability A cost-effective solution for large-scale deployments without compromising performance Powered by RouterOS v7 Provides full control, user…
